users.bioText: You're a buster if you don't like mustard.
I have a lot of money.
I take my job here very seriously.

cards.name: Harshoe the Hairless
cards.descriptionText: Whenever Harshoe attacks, draw a card.
cards.quoteText: Wow, I didn't expect him to be so handsome.

cards.name: Crimbob
cards.descriptionText: Whenever Crimbob attacks, draw a card.
cards.quoteText: Wow, I didn't expect him to be so Crim.

cards.name: Veska, Ashen Cantor
cards.descriptionText: Whenever Veska deals combat damage to a player, that player discards a card.
cards.quoteText: Every verse ends the same way: with someone losing something.

cards.name: Gullveil Sentinel
cards.descriptionText: Other creatures you control with flying get +0/+1.
cards.quoteText: The sky does not forgive intruders.

cards.name: Cracked Reservoir Golem
cards.descriptionText: {T}: Add one blue mana.
cards.quoteText: Even broken things hold water for a while.

cards.name: Thistlebound Oracle
cards.descriptionText: When Thistlebound Oracle enters the battlefield, look at the top three cards of your library. Put one into your hand and the rest on the bottom in any order.
cards.quoteText: The forest tells its secrets to those who kneel.

cards.name: Emberlash, Cinder Wolf
cards.descriptionText: Whenever Emberlash attacks, it deals 1 damage to each opponent.
cards.quoteText: It doesn't hunt for hunger. It hunts for warmth.

cards.name: Wraithcall Deacon
cards.descriptionText: When Wraithcall Deacon enters the battlefield, target creature gets -3/-3 until end of turn. If it dies this turn, you gain 2 life.
cards.quoteText: Speak softly, and the dead will listen closer.

cards.name: Loomkeeper Automaton
cards.descriptionText: Whenever an artifact enters the battlefield under your control, put a +1/+1 counter on Loomkeeper Automaton.
cards.quoteText: It was built to remember, and it has not stopped.

cards.name: Sundering Harpy
cards.descriptionText: Whenever Sundering Harpy deals combat damage to a creature, exile that creature instead of putting it into its owner's graveyard if it would die this turn.
cards.quoteText: The wind does not negotiate with what it carries away.

cards.name: Hollowmere Widow
cards.descriptionText: At the beginning of your end step, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.
cards.quoteText: She wove the lake into a net long before anyone learned to swim away.

cards.name: Gladewarden Ancient
cards.descriptionText: Whenever Gladewarden Ancient is dealt damage, prevent that damage and you gain that much life.
cards.quoteText: Grow where you're planted, and be harder to cut down.

cards.name: Static Prophet
cards.descriptionText: Whenever you draw your second card each turn, Static Prophet deals 2 damage to target opponent.
cards.quoteText: The future is just static until you know how to tune it.

cards.name: Rootbind Colossus
cards.descriptionText: Rootbind Colossus costs {2} less to cast for each land you control with the same name.
cards.quoteText: It grew from a single seed that refused every season of drought.

cards.name: Fadewhisper Duelist
cards.descriptionText: When Fadewhisper Duelist enters the battlefield, target creature can't block this turn.
cards.quoteText: You never see the one that ends the duel.

cards.name: Bright Ledger Magistrate
cards.descriptionText: At the beginning of your upkeep, create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token for each opponent who has less life than you.
cards.quoteText: Debts of the field are paid in bodies, not coin.

cards.name: Marrowsong Choir
cards.descriptionText: When Marrowsong Choir dies, return target creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to your hand.
cards.quoteText: They hum the names of everyone they've outlasted.

cards.name: Skyline Adjudicator
cards.descriptionText: Whenever an opponent casts an instant or sorcery spell, you may draw a card. If you do, discard a card.
cards.quoteText: It weighs every argument mid-air before letting it land.

cards.name: Harblood Ritualist
cards.descriptionText: {T}, Sacrifice a creature: Harblood Ritualist deals damage equal to the sacrificed creature's power to any target.
cards.quoteText: Every offering buys a little more fire.

cards.name: Chorus of the Undertow
cards.descriptionText: When Chorus of the Undertow enters the battlefield, return target creature and target land to their owners' hands. Draw a card.
cards.quoteText: The tide asks for two things at once, and takes them without asking again.
